direct12_view_contract.measurement_reuse: the exact sixteen complete A388 W50 Direct12 slice artifacts

selection_contract.locked_primary_reason: prospective A350 recovery completed at exact rank 445 in the independently frozen A349 order
selection_contract.companion_candidate_set: all seven remaining complete Direct12 views
selection_contract.eligibility_rule: corrected A354 rank at the actual A348 measured W46 cell must be at most 1024 of 4096
selection_contract.selection_rule: among eligible non-primary candidates minimize absolute Spearman rank correlation with the locked primary on the complete unlabeled W50 field; ties minimize corrected A354 W46 rank and then the frozen view name

source_contract.owner_rule: minimum one-based source rank; ties by frozen source-role order
source_contract.owner_lane_rule: sort each assigned cell by its owning source rank

worker_contract.claim_rule: each worker consumes its nonempty owner queue; once empty it consumes the longest remaining owner queue; ties by frozen source-role order
worker_contract.epoch_rule: exactly one complete W50 prefix group per worker per nonterminal epoch
worker_contract.group_cost_identity: every W50 prefix executes exactly 128 disjoint 2^31 slabs before outcome evaluation

comparison_contract.primary: complete pointwise A400 epoch versus A398 and A396 epoch panels
secondary: complete eight-view W50 pairwise diversity atlas
comparison_contract.retain_rule: retain the exact atlas, frozen-rule selection, and complete schedule regardless of which eligible companion wins

information_boundary.known_pre_design_information: A350 prospective pair-slice recovery rank 445, corrected A354 W46 view ranks, A388 pair-slice order, and A398 pair-versus-triple-slice geometry
unknown_at_design_freeze: the other six W50 Direct12 view orders
the complete W50 eight-view diversity atlas
A400 owner lanes and worker schedule
